1.content:
Jack had just finished up his final class of the day, Physics, and was heading down the hall to his U.S History class, where he needed to finish up some extra work. He was surprised to find that the class was nearly half full, with normal days often only seeing three or four other people in there with him. Regardless, he took his seat and got out his work to do. While he was digging around in his backpack, though, Jack noticed the shrink ray he had bought not too long ago which he had not tested out yet. Looking around, he noticed all the other students were either on their phones or doing work, regardless, not paying attention.

Deciding that this would be an opportune time to try this machine out, Jack stealthily brought it out and set it on the table. He looked over the size options on the side which read: "Regular Size" "1/3 size" and "1/10 size". Mulling over his options, Jack decided the "1/10 size" would be the best for him to be able to sneak around the class and tus set the machine to that setting. Before pulling pressing the button to initiate the shrink ray, Jack took one final look around the classroom to make sure no one would notice. Confirming everyone was oblivious, Jack then proceeded and he was reduced down to a few inches in stature, remaining on his chair.

Excited that his plan worked, Jack first shimmied down his chair leg to the floor and thought of the first thing he should do. Most of the people in the classroom Jack didn't recognize, so it may not be too wise approaching them, but he did know a few. Two of his closer friends, Brigette and Mariah were off in separate corners of the room, appearing to be focused on their work. Trish, the lead cheerleader, was in the back of the room on her phone with a couple of her friends. The final person Jack knew in here was Lauren, the student body president. She was definitely a little uptight, always organized and somewhat of a pain in the butt, ordering people to live up to school standards. Additionally, though, Jack had the option of leaving the room and exploring the halls or go outside.

What does Jack do?
1.title: After School

choices: No, Jack stayed put and Brigette returned
Yes, another person spotted Jack and quickly snatched him
11.content:
Jack decided Brigette would be his best option and traverses around the backpacks and other things spewed about the classroom floor, making sure not to catch anyone else's attention. When he arrived at Brigette's seat, Jack confirmed that she was working on some sort of classwork. This meaning, she would probably be a little less attentive to her surroundings. Jack began climbing the back of her chair, figuring this would be the best way to keep out of her sight. When he got up to the seat of her chair, Jack once again faced a different dilemma. To get to Brigette's shoulder, he could climb up her back, which was rather straight and unless his grip was strong would most likely send him plummeting back down. On the other hand, Jack could also climb Brigette's front and risk getting caught.

Ultimately, Jack thought it would be best to climb up the front of Brigette and moved around then ascended her thigh. Moving toward her shirt, Jack's steps indented in the tights Brigette had worn that day. He wondered whether or not Brigette could feel him considering his indents on her leg, and Jack found that out when he noticed Brigette's hand coming his way. Unsure of what to do, Jack leapt to his left, trying to make it to Brigette's right thigh, but fell in between her legs.

After feeling her leg for some itch, Brigette's hand retreated. "That was interesting" Jack thought. Now he faced the crotch of one of his best friends. Even through the fabric of both Brigette's leggings and her underwear, Jack could feel the heat radiating from it. Jack knew that this was an extra sensitive area, so he thought it would be best if he went up the side of Brigette's thigh. When he did so, though, Brigette's leg quivered then began to shift. Jack looked up and saw the visage of his friend peering down at him.

"Oh crap" Jack thought as he realized he had just given away his position. "What the hell?" Brigette quietly uttered out looud. She reached down and grabbed whatever bug was on her and brought it to her face for inspection. "What kind of- wait, is that a person?" Brigette gasped. Jack waved feebily and chuckled. "No way. Jack?!" Brigette whispered in astonishment. "Yup, it's me" he laughed. "You probably want to know how I got like this".

"Well, of course I do but that can wait for later. Right now, I got to keep you safe, you're in a lot of danger at that size" Brigette explained. "I don't have any pockets though because of these dumb leggings. I'll have to put you in my backpack for now, I'll bring you out after I'm finished".

"Wait! Can't you just keep me on your desk?" Jack asked. Brigette hesitated. "Are you sure? Then you're in plain sight and might get nabbed bu someone, or even fall of the desk". Jack nodded is reassurance. "I'll be fine, I promise". Brigette shrugged. "Okay then, that's fine". Brigette placed Jack on her desk and got back to work.

The two chatted a little bit while Brigette continued working but eventually paused their conversation while she went to turn her stuff in. When Brigette got up, did anything happen to Jack?
11.title: Venture over to Brigette and see what she's...

Go to Brigette's room
Go to the kitchen
111.content:
Fortunately, nothing eventful happened as Jack waited for Brigette to do what she had to do. When she returned, Brigette gave Jack a quick smile, then began packing her things. As she was wrapping up, Brigette turned to Jack. "I think you should come with me back to my place, that would be the safest bet for you. What do you think?". Jack shrugged. "I mean, that's fine, but I obviously got to get back home. Do you think you could just drop me off at my house? I'll be able to work out what I want to do next from there".

"Oh come on, we can chill at my house and have some fun!" Brigette nudged. Jack rolled his eyes and sighed. "I suppose, but seriously. Honestly, my mom would probably lose her mind if I wasn't back". Brittany huffed as she replied: "How would you even grab her attention? You're just a few inches tall!".

"I promise I'll be able to figure that out. Plus, it would be much better if she saw me in any form rather than not at all" Jack responded. Brigette reluctantly nodded. "Okay, that makes sense. But I could always take you back after, like, an hour or so. It'll be cool!". Jack laughed at Brigette's persistence. "Fine, fine, you win. I'll stay for an hour than you can take me back". Brigette grinned and zipped up her backpack, ready to head out to her car. "For the meantime, I'll just keep you here, if you don't mind" she said as she motioned to her shirt. Jack blushed and nodded. Brigette noticed and giggled, then pulled back the neck of her shirt and dropped Jack in.

Although Brigette didn't necessarily have the most sizable breasts in her class, they were still extremely large to Jack. He fell onto her right breast, then slid in between it and the side of Brigette's bra. Brigette smiled, noticing Jack was tucked in, then released her shirt and went on her way. As she walked, Jack swayed up and down, rubbing against her smooth skin. Jack had to admit, it was pretty nice. In none too long though, Brigette got to her car and the movement stopped. Then, a light flooded into Jack's view and in came Brigette's hand. She lifted Jack out of her shirt and placed him on the seat next to her.

"Okay, here we go. Shouldn't be too long, but just make sure you're safe, okay?" Brigette worriedly asked. Jack laughed and confirmed he would be.

When the two get back to Brigette's house, what do they do first?

1111.content:
As the two arrived in the house, Brigette's mom called from the kitchen welcoming her daughter home, of course unknowing of her tiny passenger. Brigette replied with a hi, then set her backpack down and went to the living room to hang out with Jack, or figure something else out. She sat down on the couch, then brought Jack out of her pocket and set him on the cushon next to her.

"All right, so, what do ya wanna do?" Brigette asked. Jack shrugged. "I don't know, I'm down for doing anything really. We can just chill or something, have some snacks. Speaking of which, I'm a little hungry, could I get something to eat?". Brigette smiled and nodded. "I'll go get something, anything specific sound good?". Jack shook his head and Brigette went off to the kitchen to grab something. While she was gone, Jack took a brief moment contemplating whether or not he should grow himself back to normal size or wait. He did have the shrink ray at the ready in his pocket, although he wasn't sure if this would be such a good time, considering he might alert Brigette and/or her family about his device. Unfortunately for Jack, though, his thoughts were interrupted as a monumental shadow overtook his field of vision. Brigette was sitting down.

Jack immediately went in to fight-or-flight mode and just managed to get out of the way of Brigette's jean-clad butt as it crashed onto the couch. "Okay, Jack, I got us some chips to much on" she said. Brigette, confused not hearing a response, looked at her side and noticed Jack out of breath. "Hey, everything okay?". Jack looked at her and rolled his eyes. "I mean, you did just very narrowly miss me with your ass, but otherwise I'm fine". Brigette giggled. "I'm sorry, dude, I guess I didn't take into consideration the fact that you need a little bit more room on the couch. Here, I'll put you on the table so you can grab some chips". Jack simply sighed and laughed at Brigette's kind obliviousness and hopped into the bag of chips and ate along as Brigette watched TV.

A little time passes, and the two just have idle chat as they eat up on the remaining half of the bag of chips. "Okay, so, Jack. Would you rather-- oh, actually hold that thought. I'm going to go to the bathroom for a minute, I'll be right back" Brigette informed. Jack simply nodded and went back to chowing down on the abnormally large snacks. As he's eating, though, something happens.

What is it?
1111.title: Go to the living room

11111.content:
Distracted by the subjectively immense amount of snacking around him, Jack was unaware of the hand approaching him. When he finally grasped what was going on, it was too little, too late for him and he was plucked up, along with a chip. As he was raised outside of the bag, Jack spun around and noticed it was Brigette's mom who had grabbed him, presumably by mistake. Jack tried his best to get her attention and notice what she was about to do, but Brigette's mom had been enticed into the show that was on the TV and was nonchalantly bringing the snack to her lips. Not even looking at the chip, Brigette's mom opened her mouth, accentuated her glistening white teeth and voluptuous tongue, then popped the chip and Jack into her mouth.

Once inside, Jack made a break for the lady's lips, but they shut before he had the chance and her tongue quickly began moving him about. Jack struggled with all of his might, but Brigette's mom simply thought of him as nothing more than a rogue chip and thrashed her tongue all about him to sterilize him. And that, she did. Fortuantely, Brigette's mom never brought Jack to her teeth to be grinded up, but rather simply pressed him up against the roof of her mouth along with sucking on him to gain as much flavor out of him as possible. Although Jack didn't understand how the woman didn't understand he wasn't a snack, it was clear she thought he was good enough to continue with the process.

Eventually, Jack had been tossed about enough by the tongue that he could barely move. Soaked in saliva and with poor visibility, Jack was brought into the paste of chip on the middle of Brigette's mom's tongue and slowly moved to the back of her throat. Jack opened his eyes one final time, peering down the long, somewhat throbbing throat of his friend's own mother and was then moved into final position.

*GULP*

----------------------------------


Brigette came into the living room and sat down at the couch, and looked around the living room, hoping to find Jack. Unsuccessful in finding him anywhere, she began to panic, and her mom came around wondering what was the matter. "I- I can't find my friend! He was small, I don't know what happened, but he shrunk somehow and-- I don't need to get into the details, he's barely a couple inches tall and he was right here! Gosh, I hope he's okay!". Brigette's mom, albeit confused, reassured her daughter it was going to be okay, and began helping her look around the house. Unbeknownst to her, she was in the process of digesting that same friend.

A few hours later, Brigette's mom let out a fart and out came Jack's clothing, launched into the fabric of her underwear only to be washed away in her next load of laundry. Whether Jack remains within Brigette's mom or whether he contributed to her next porcelain party, we will never know...

11112.content:
As he was distracted by the amazingly sized chips, Jack failed to notice the figure looming towards the bag. Brigette's sister, Tara, noticed her sister had brought out some of the chips from the kitchen and thought that she wouldn't mind if she took the bag to her room, and thus, she did. Jack tumbled as he felt the bag float upwards and he quickly glanced to see what was going on, only for him to get a tiny peek at Tara's unassuming face as she closed the bag. Now panicking, Jack tried to figure out a way to get out of the bag before something bad happened to him. Considering his life could be on the line, Jack thought about using his shrink ray to grow himself back to normal, but in all likelihood, that would cause much more harm than good. Instead, Jack accepted the reality of the situation and decided he was going to make a break for the exit whenever Tara would open the bag again, or if that took too long, try and make a hole in the side of the bag.

After laying back on the snacks all around him for a couple minutes, Jack felt his world fall onto a soft platform, which was Tara's bed. Jack then flew up in the air for a moment as Tara jumped on her bed, sending the bag of chips upwards. This ultimately cost Jack, though, as when he came back down, most of his body was buried beneath dozens of chips, and Jack had very little mobility. Tara texted her friends for a few moments, leaving Jack in suspense and semidarkness, but then opened up the bag. Jack, with what mobility he did have, tried to get Tara's attention, flailing his arms as best as he could. Tara had just began to glaze her eyes over Jack and the chips when she heard Brigette call out to her and her sister coming to her room. Rolling her eyes, Tara closed the bag and hid it under her bed covers.

"Dammit," Jack thought, "what the hell do I have to do to get free again?". Over his own thoughts, Jack could tell Brigette was distressed as she talked with Tara. "Bridge, what's going on? Why are you so stressed?".

"I can't find my tiny fri- earrings. I can't seem to find my earrings" Brigette stuttered. Jack felt a small rush of relief as he heard Brigette fix mentioning his size. He had no idea how Tara would react to such news, but he didn't really want to find out. "Well, chill, I'm sure we'll be able to find them, is it really life-or-death?". Brigette's tone didn't change. "It could be for him! I mean, it's gotta be dangerous for someone his size to be--" Brigette paused, realizing what she had said. "Brigette, what the hell are you talking about? I thought you said you lost your earrings?" Tara quizzically responded. Jack took a deep breath and facepalmed. He knew Brigette didn't mean to do it, but for heaven's sake.

"No, no it's not my earrings," Brigette sighed. "Here's what's actually going on..." Brigette then went on for a minute or two, detailing to Tara the predicament that was going on, finishing by mentioning Jack was last seen near the bag of chips. "Oh, well then, I might be able to help you out. Maybe, I'm not a hundred percent sure if he's here, but anyways" Tara said as she took the bag of chips out from under her covers. "Oh, that's where it was, I was wondering what the heck happened to my snacks, ya little thief" Brigette said. Tara just chuckled and opened the bag, revealing Jack and his dilemma.

"Hi..." Jack said as he gave a nervous wave, While Tara was astonished at finding a miniature guy, Brigette was relieved to have finally found Jack. She scooped him up in her hand and said: "Oh, glad to see you're okay, Jack! I was thinking you might have gotten squished or something considering the lack of awareness of some people". Once again, Tara giggled. "I'm sorry for that whole ordeal, little guy. I hope I can make it up to ya," Tara said with a wink. "I'll give you my number, maybe sometime I can take you out to the beach with me or something. You're pretty cute". Jack blushed and kindly accepted the offer. "Well, I should probably get back to my hosue. Mind taking me home, Brigette?". Brigette nodded and Tara waved to Jack as they went away.

When the two arrive at Jack's house, what happens?

111121.content:
Brigette pulled into the driveway and kept her car running for a moment. "All right, dude, we're here. Are you sure you don't want me taking you inside? It seems like quite the trek for your size" Brigette questioned. "Absolutely, I'll be fine," Jack assured. "But if I'm still like this tomorrow or something, you can give me a ride around school" he laughed. Brigette smiled. "Sure thing, Jack, just let me know. But I'll let ya get going, see you later". The two waved to each other and Brigette pulled out of the driveway then drove away. Now alone, Jack figured that this may be a good time to grow back and promptly took out the shrink ray. Within just a few moments, Jack was back to normal height and luckily for him, no one saw his growing.

Jack walked into the house and was greeted by his mom and sisters in the living room. "How was your day, sweetie?" his mom asked. Jack just shrugged and replied: "Nothing too special. Might hang out with Brigette or someone tomorrow, is that okay?". Carey nodded. "Just be back by five, okay? Your aunt and cousins are coming over for dinner". Jack sighed and nodded in understanding.

Ever since his favorite cousin, Michael, left for the military just over a year ago, he's had to deal with his other three cousins, Clara, Jess and Rachel in addition to his own younger sisters. Rachel was the oldest of the three at 22. She liked to drink quite a bit and since Michael was no longer here to help filter her behavior, she often messed around with Jack and had some tumbles. Jess was the middle child, the same age as Jack, 18, and was mischievous at heart. She always liked to team up with Jack's sisters and pick on him, often finding some way to humiliate him. Finally, Clara. Jack's aunt had adopted her a few years ago when she was a baby. Now five, Jack liked Clara the most out of the three because she was always super kind and genuinely liked to play games WITH him and not USING him. Jack's aunt, Aunt Martha, was now 50, and just like her sister, kept in excellent shape. She was always kind to Jack, but on occasion, would tease him.

Jack just waved to his sisters as he went up to his room, and they just gave him a nod. He just sat down on his bed and got on his laptop to watch Youtube or find something else entertaining as he thought about any ways possible to avoid his cousins as much as possible. He spent the rest of the night lounging around in his room, trying to scheme something to better his experience the next day, to little success. At least tomorrow was Friday.

The next day, Jack woke up at the normal 7:00, got dressed and prepared for the day. The girls were also up, dragging their feet as they dreaded another day of lame school. Jack, on the other hand, was a little bit brighter than them that morning, considering he might be able to use his shrink ray once again as he concealed it in his back pocket. A little time passes and everyone is finally ready to go. Everyone got in the car and Carey took them off to school.

At school, does Jack shrink himself before his classes begin or does he wait to do it later?

Looking around the outside of the school, Jack noticed that there were too many people filtering in and out of the building for him not to be noticed, so instead of shrinking right then and there, Jack decided to wait a little longer and find a more private area. Walking into the school, it seemed different since he was back to normal size. He just laughed at himself for being stupid and continued walking along, passing by other kids in the halls until he made it to his locker. Jack opened it up and grabbed his material for his next class, Math, and was about to leave before Tara came up to him.

"Hey, cutie, how are you back to normal so soon?" she flirted. Jack chuckled dryly, feeling a little uncomfortable. "Uh, it's no big deal, I have my ways". But Tara was persistent, she wanted to know how in case his size was interchangable. "No, really. You were just a few inches yesterday, and now you're back to being taller than me today? Do you have a some sort of device or something?". Jack waivered. "Wow, uh, yeah actually" he said as he pulled out the shrink ray. "This is it. I used it last night before entering my house so my family wouldn't be curious. You can't tell anyone about this though, okay?". Tara smiled. "Absolutely, your word is safe with me. By the way, if you ever wanna, you know, come with me to my classes and perk up my day, just text me and meet me out by room 212. I wouldn't mind you testing that baby out" she winked. With that, Tara walked away and Jack got back to what he was doing. The bell rang, and he went to his class, thinking about Tara's invitation all the while.

Once he arrived in his class, Jack got his stuff out and it began. He couldn't focus on the subject, though, Jack just kept thinking about Tara. Sure, she was really attractive, but it was one of his best friends' sister, it just seemed weird to do something like that. And what would happen if he did do it? What would Tara do? Regardless of whether he was going with Tara, Jack was planning on using his shrink ray at some point, if not for messing with his friends, then certainly to escape classwork. Now wasn't the time, though, Jack had to keep up with the math material otherwise he would fall way behind and it would be difficult to make up. Jack texted Tara, letting her know that he was going to take her up on her offer. "sweet! meet me over at my locker and we'll go from there. see ya then, cutie" Tara replied. Jack was a little nervous as to what Tara exactly had in mind, but he got over it and went to her locker. He met a waiting Tara as he arrived and she smiled at him. "You ready, Jack? I', sure this will brighten up both our days" Tara grinned. "I suppose, but just know I have to be at my fourth block, we're having our midterm today" Jack responded. Tara pouted. He pressed the button and in a moment's notice, Jack was a few inches tall.

Tara bent down in awe and picked him up. "That's incredible" she muttered. "Anyways, we gotta get to my next class, I'll put you in here in the meantime". Tara pulled back the front of her noticeably tight shirt and threw Jack in. "Wait, are you gonna at least put me in the side of your bra or something so I can-"

"No time" Tara interrupted and she pushed Jack into the abyss that was her cleavage. Smiling, Tara released her shirt and Jack was completely encased in darkness. He could feel the sway of Tara's gait as she moved swiftly to her next class. Jack tried to move just to get more comfortable, but the tight grip Tara's soft bosom had eliminated any chance of that. Relaxing, Jack began to enjoy his tight yet warm and soothing envrionment and the enjoyment was mutual, Tara was also having a good time. When the swaying had finally subsided, Jack knew that Tara had found her class and her seat and he called out for her from his confinement, but all of his sounds were muffled as his surroundings were practically soundproof.

"Dammit" Jack thought, "Maybe this wasn't such a good idea after all. If she forgets about me, then I can't do anything". Fortuantely for Jack, though, Tara remembered and soon brought him out after attendance was taken. "How was the ride, cutie? I have to say for myself that I enjoyed it," Tara giggled. "It.. it was okay. Nice and comfortable I suppose," Jack uncomfortably responded. "What's the matter? Something wrong?".

"I don't know, maybe this wasn't such a good idea. I mean, what if you forget about me at some point?" Jack questioned. Tara giggled. "You're silly, how could I ever forget about you? You're so cute and nice. It would be a crime if I wasn't able to get some playtime with you before you're midterm". Jack took a second to process what she just said. "'Playtime'?" he thought. "But, in the meantime, I have to get started on my work, little guy, I'll let you rest up here for a moment". Tara placed Jack on top of her desk and began to work on the task at hand.

After a few moments of working, Tara returned her attention to her tiny companion. "Okay, so. Ready for some fun, cutie?" Tara smirked. Jack was nervous and uncomfortably nodded. Tara picked him up and grabbed the front of her waistband. "Tara! What are you doing?!" Jack called out. Tara quizzically looked at him. "I thought we were going to have fun, were we not?".

How does Jack respond?

Although she was sort of uptight, Jack thought Wendy was kind of cute. She had long black hair and dark eyes, which went well with her school outfit which most days was a dark cardigan and a black skirt. Wendy continued into the classroom, already distressed that she was later than usual to her class. She had been feeling a little bloated that day, unsure why, but unfortunately it was distracting her from her school work. Unable to flip to his front to crawl, Jack began pushing his body downwards, hoping to make it to in between Wendy's legs. His little luck soon ran out, though, and a rumbling came from the huge ass above him.

*Pfft*

Wendy pressed on her stomach, hoping to relieve some of the pressure, and released a quick fart in the process. Unbeknownst to her, the little man under her felt the consquences of her gas leak. It got even worse for him when she sat back down. Now trapped with the stale air all around him, Jack began to fade. He was doomed. Wendy let out fart after fart, effectively knocking Jack out. The last thing Jack could recognize as he passed into unconsciousness was the booming sound of Wendy releasing her pressure and the horrid stench filling his nostrils...

The two, feeling a bit hungry, go to the kitchen to find something to munch on. Making sure her family wouldn't notice Jack, Brigette hid him in her jacket pocket as she entered the kitchen.

From here on out, Jack was never able to escape from Sarah. She remained attentive on his every move and never kept him out of her sight. For the rest of his puny life, Jack was Sarah's toy, used for anything and everything she wanted. Whether it was cleaning under her arms, licking the gunk in and around her feet, or enduring Sarah's ass, Jack would never be the same again...

1513.content:
Arriving in her room, Sarah sighed and collapsed into her bed. Forgetting Jack was still in her pants, Sarah pulled the covers over her and began to drift off to sleep. Jack, meanwhile, was struggling as best as he could to either get her attention or free himself. It was fortunate that Sarah was laying on her front right now, but who knew how long it would last until she flipped over. As Jack continued his escape, Sarah would unconsciously flex her cheeks and create setbacks for Jack, thinking him as nothing more than an itch. With these inconveniences, Jack was occasionally sent back into the crevice between Sarah's pale mounds, although only superficially deep.

As Jack finally made it out of her crack and began scaling his way out of Sarah's pants, however, it happened. Sarah turned over in her sleep and Jack was sent further down her pants and against the inside fabric of her panties. He could do nothing as the all too familiar sight of Sarah's ass engulfed his view and her left cheek smashed into him. Now without any mobility whatsoever, Jack had to hope that Sarah would flip over again in her sleep or else he was doomed to remain under her butt for the rest of the night and in all likelihood remain with her for much longer afterwards. But, as the warmth and smoothness of Sarah's skin and the pressure of her ass remained high, Jack drifted to sleep as well, albeit against his own will.

Jack awoke to much less pressure exerted on him and not nearly as warm of conditions. He still felt Sarah's flesh pressing into him, though he was being rubbed around. Sarah was moving. Still a little groggy after his night's ordeal, Jack didn't understand what was going on. It wasn't until Sarah pulled down her pants that Jack realized she was in the bathroom. Apparently, Sarah had completely forgotten Jack for the time being and was taking a shower before getting ready for school. Now coming to his senses, Jack quickly hopped out of Sarah's pants and hid behind the toilet. When he heard the water to the shower turn on, Jack made his move and escaped out of the bathroom.

What's his next move from here?

info.description:
Jack: 18 years old, Jack is going through his senior year of high school. He is 5’10, athletically built, and has brown hair with blue eyes. Unbeknownst to his family, Jack has bought a functional shrink ray and plans on testing it at some point.

Carey: 47 years old, Carey is Jack’s mom. She sports brown hair and brown eyes and has remained in excellent shape, with healthy assets up front and from behind. Carey is very loving of her children and does an amazing job running the family without a father present.

Isabella (Izzy): 16 years old, Izzy is the middle child of the family and is in her sophomore year of high school. She very much resembles her mom with the same brown hair and brown eyes, but has physically developed earlier than anyone her age, catching the attention of many. A very cheeky sister, Izzy loves to mess around with Jack.

Lucy: 15 years old, Lucy is the youngest of the three children and is in her freshman year of high school. Oddly enough, she has black hair and blue eyes, contrasting her mother and sister. Unlike her sister, Lucy has not developed as significantly; however, is still nothing to overlook. She loves her family very much, especially her brother, and is very cautious.

Brigette: 17 years old, Brigette is one of Jack’s neighbors and close friends. She is also in her senior year of high school and shares a few classes with Jack. Brigette has long, blonde hair with blue eyes and a modest figure. They often go to and come from school together, considering they live so close.

Portia: 16 years old, Portia is another one of Jack’s neighbors. She is of Asian descent and has long, black hair with brown eyes. Portia is pretty shy around other people but likes to open up to Jack and go to and from school with him on occasion. Unbeknownst to Jack, she may have feelings for him.

Eiko: 14 years old, Eiko is a Japanese exchange student who is currently residing with Portia. She has medium long black hair and soft, brown eyes. In contrast to Portia, Eiko is very social and sports a very developed body. Because of her close proximity to Jack, Eiko has grown very fond of him and has on multiple occasions tried to get her alone with him.

Trish: 17 years old, Trish is the lead cheerleader at Tahoma High School and is very much one of the popular students. She has long, dirty blonde hair and brown eyes, with a smoking body to match. More often than not, she doesn’t pay too much attention to Jack and spends most of her time with her clique. On occasion, though, she does run into Jack and their interactions vary.

Mariah: 18 years old, Mariah is possibly Jack’s closest friend. She has a slightly bigger advantage in her front than the back, and sometimes likes to tease Jack about it. Mariah has medium brown hair with blue eyes and her and Jack share nearly every class together. Funny enough, both her and Jack have some feelings for the other, but neither have said anything.
